property_summary: The property at 123 Main St, Springfield, was inspected on 2023-10-25, revealing various issues with the roof, basement, and electrical systems.

area_observations.Roof: Shingle roof shows signs of wear and minor curling. Flashing around the chimney appears loose. Gutters on the east side are clogged.
area_observations.Basement: Musty smell, visible water stains on the north foundation wall, and standing water in the sump pump pit.
area_observations.Electrical: Outdated main electrical panel, double-tapped circuits, and exposed wiring near the water heater.

root_cause: Potential causes include inadequate maintenance, poor installation, and age-related wear and tear.
severity_assessment: Moderate to severe issues were found, particularly with the roof and basement, which could lead to further damage if not addressed.
recommended_actions: Repair or replace loose chimney flashing
Investigate and address the source of water stains in the basement
Update the main electrical panel and address double-tapped circuits and exposed wiring
additional_notes: Thermal imaging revealed a significant cold spot near the chimney flashing area and widespread moisture behind the drywall/concrete in the basement. Elevated temperatures were detected in two breakers, indicating potential overloading or loose connections.
